songs.title: Father Figure
feed: “Father Figure” by Taylor Swift climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 56 spots to #2.

“Father Figure” by Taylor Swift is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 49 sales units.

“Father Figure” by Taylor Swift is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 357,742 total units.
